name: coODGetBitSize
title: coODGetBitSize
syntax: dwordcoODGetBitSize( dword index, dword subIndex, dword errCode[] );
description: The function returns the size of an object in the local object dictionary in bits.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the object, value range 1..65.535

return: Size of the object in bits
